content: You have just been restarted. Read your RESUME.MD file for context and pending task, then execute it. Do NOT call process_restart again.

I'll read my RESUME.MD file to understand the pending task and context.Perfect! I can see the pending task. The user wants me to create a file `projects/test_output.txt` with "hello world" content. The planning agent was having `UsageStats` import errors, but the user has fixed them. Let me now spawn the planning agent to complete this file creation task.Great! I've assigned the file creation task to the planning agent. The agent is already running and has received the task. It will create `projects/test_output.txt` with "hello world" content. 

The task is now running in the background. Once it completes, you'll see the result in the next interaction. This will verify that the `UsageStats` import errors have been resolved after your fixes and the restart.
